outline.title: Contemporary Theological Issues
outline.summary: A seminar exploring pressing theological questions and challenges facing the contemporary church, including justice, pluralism, technology, environment, gender, and the role of Christianity in a secular society.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Examine how classical Christian theology addresses contemporary issues while remaining open to new insights. Engage current theological discourse and develop informed Christian responses to modern challenges.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Learning Outcomes
outline.summary: Students will identify contemporary theological issues, understand diverse perspectives, develop informed responses, engage in theological dialogue, and apply reflection to Christian practice.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Major Topics
outline.summary: Justice and reconciliation, pluralism and interfaith dialogue, gender and sexuality, environmental theology, technology and digital ethics, church and society, and global Christianity.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Theological Movements
outline.summary: Liberation theology, feminist theology, womanist theology, queer theology, and creation care theology provide frameworks for engaging contemporary issues.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: How We Learn
outline.summary: Case studies, theological debates, guest speakers, student research projects, and interfaith engagement create dynamic learning experiences.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Why This Matters
outline.summary: This course prepares graduates for prophetic, contextual ministry in the 21st century, developing theological imagination and pastoral sensitivity to community concerns.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Theology in Action
outline.summary: Contemporary theological issues are not abstract debates but urgent challenges requiring faithful Christian response grounded in tradition and attentive to the present moment.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
